name: String Beans and Zucchini Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the string beans in water and snap off the stems.
2. Cut the beans into 2-inch-long pieces.
3. Clean the zucchini under cold running water, remove both ends, and cut into small rounds.
4. Peel the onion and cut it into small pieces.
5. Heat ghee or butter over medium heat. Add the onions and sauté until they are soft.
6. Add mustard seeds. When they begin to jump, add turmeric, cumin, and coriander powders. Sauté the onions again until fully coated with spices.
7. Add the string beans and mix well. Cover and cook for 4 minutes.
8. Add the zucchini rounds and stir. Include chili powder, garlic powder, and salt. Cook for an additional 8 to 10 minutes.
9. Serve hot or warm as a side dish.
